global_status.description: Executive status for the visible NOC layer.

alerts.description: Current unresolved alerts rendered by the live panel.

decisions.description: Governed decisions projected from existing local state and policy evidence.

kpis.description: Small numeric facts used by the API and UI cards.

runtime.description: Local runtime context for visualization only; not governance authority.

timeline.description: Recent state and decision events suitable for the visible timeline.

source_summary.description: Traceability back to the existing source files used to build the state.
